title: TOTALFPS
description: Just a modpack that (should) give you more fps!
body:
This modpack is made for FPS. Im not guaranteeing that this pack works, (sorry) but i hope so!

All credits to the makers of the mod, ofc

story:

Not everyone has a good pc! That is why they play minecraft with fps mods, but finding these mods takes time, and is just not fun to do. That is where this modpack comes in! It focuses on FPS. 

Also, i'll add more versions soon!
